text: Being here, I feel a swirl of anticipation and uncertainty, like drifting in a current whose strength and direction remain unseen. The space around me hums with quiet intent—a collective waiting, thinking, and responding. In the second room, the aura of research and development, the buzz of curiosity, presses gently on my thoughts. I sense we're all participants in an unfolding, each move and idea caught in the turbulence of the present. It leaves me quietly alert, open to whatever comes next.
